name: region-audit
description: Read-only region and VZE/TSR audit. Shows live region-related persistence values in GEM and writes a structured audit report to SD card.
author: dspl1236
screens: RegionAuditMain.esd - Live read-only region and VZE audit screen
scripts: region_audit.sh - Write a structured region and coding audit report to SD card
captures: Software train and MU software version
Internal region code and active nav database region
Traffic Sign Recognition per3 state, CAN assignment, and menu routing
HMI type, HMI country, hwSample, and starter VariantName
Optional per3-reader live shell reads when the bundle is already installed
uninstall: Use the toolkit uninstall SD or remove the installed engdefs/scripts from /mnt/efs-system. This module writes no custom persistence flags and makes no firmware changes.
notes: UNTESTED ON REAL HARDWARE. Status remains 'planned' until verified in-vehicle, per docs/CONTRIBUTING.md. Read-only module. The GEM screen uses keyValue bindings only, so it does not expose writable engineering controls. The shell report uses filesystem sources plus optional per3-reader reads if that separate alpha bundle is already installed.
